content:textarea:6:55.name: Paragraph
content:textarea:6:55.html: This holiday season, give the gift of your time by volunteering as a Salvation Army Red Kettle Bell Ringer!

content:textarea:7:32.name: Paragraph
content:textarea:7:32.html: Whether you can spare a few hours or dedicate time throughout the season, your help will go a long way in supporting our neighbors in need.

content:textarea:9:61.name: Paragraph
content:textarea:9:61.html: The familiar sound of our Red Kettle bells isn't just a holiday tradition--it can be lifeline for someone in crisis. Donations collected through our Red Kettles are critical in funding essential social services programs year-round.

content:wysiwyg_basic:12:8.name: WYSIWYG
content:wysiwyg_basic:12:8.html:
• Operate the largest family shelter in Wake County
  • Provide nightly meals through our Community Kitchen program
  • Fund life-changing social services for individuals and families in crisis

content:textarea:18:35.name: Paragraph
content:textarea:18:35.html: We are proud to have families, civic organizations, churches, and corporations join us every year for this fun and impactful volunteer opportunity. It's a great way to give back together and spread some holiday cheer! We look forward to seeing you!
content:textarea:18:35.content:
We are proud to have families, civic organizations, churches, and corporations join us every year for this fun and impactful volunteer opportunity. It's a great way to give back together and spread some holiday cheer!
We look forward to seeing you!
